name: Turn YouTube videos into summaries, transcripts, and visual insights
description: Takes a YouTube video URL, scrapes the video page with Firecrawl, uses Claude AI to generate summaries, extract key points, identify notable scenes, and saves structured results to Google Sheets with a Slack notification.

source.originalName: Turn YouTube videos into summaries, transcripts, and visual insights

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for scraping YouTube page

googleSheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving results

analysisType.description: Type of analysis: summary, transcript, scenes, or all

slackChannel.description: Slack channel for video analysis results

steps.name: Scrape YouTube video page with Firecrawl
Extract video data from scraped content
Build Claude prompt for video analysis
Save video analysis to Google Sheets
